summary: Tested PRUMO Soalheiro full-stack: backend FastAPI quote/health endpoints (pytest 7/7 passing) and Next.js frontend (home + 4 routes, language toggle PT/EN with localStorage persistence, mobile menu, quote form e2e submission via Playwright). All critical flows working; one minor design issue and one minor UX concern noted.

issues: Mobile menu panel uses bg-brand-dark/98 but hero title text 'CONSTRUÍMOS O FUTURO' bleeds through behind the menu list, reducing readability of nav items. Consider increasing opacity to fully opaque (bg-brand-dark) or adding a stronger backdrop overlay.

action_items: (Optional / minor) Increase mobile menu background opacity so hero text behind it is fully obscured.

(Optional / minor) Consider adding HTML5 `required` attributes to the orcamento form inputs so empty submissions are blocked client-side instead of relying on the backend 422 -> generic error message ('Não foi possível enviar o pedido. Tente novamente.'). Current behaviour still satisfies the 'shows error or HTML5 validation' requirement.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is small and clean; uses motor async, excludes _id via projection in GET /api/quote, uses uuid for id - good.
Pydantic EmailStr + Field(min_length=1) correctly produce 422 for invalid/empty inputs.
LanguageProvider correctly persists to localStorage with key 'prumo-lang' and rehydrates on mount; verified across navigation.

All interactive elements have data-testid attributes (nav-*, mobile-nav-*, lang-toggle, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, orcamento-form, orcamento-input-*, orcamento-submit, orcamento-status, site-header, logo-link).
Empty form submission relies on backend 422 to show generic error - acceptable but adding HTML5 required would give clearer per-field UX.
seed_data_creation: Created several quote records prefixed with TEST_ in MongoDB 'quotes' collection via API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_prumo_api.py (pytest, BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). All 7 tests pass. Frontend Playwright validated: home hero PT/EN, lang toggle persistence across navigation to /sobre, navigation to /servicos /projetos /orcamento, quote form submit shows 'Pedido enviado com sucesso' green status and clears fields, mobile menu opens at 390px showing all 5 nav links + mobile-lang-toggle, no horizontal scroll on mobile. The first mobile test attempt failed due to a race condition immediately after viewport change - retry with networkidle wait works reliably (already used in second pass).
